mapper.select: SELECT id, name, use_count AS useCount, sort, status FROM osh_course_tag WHERE status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY use_count DESC, sort DESC

SELECT id, name, use_count AS useCount FROM osh_course_tag WHERE status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY use_count DESC, sort DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.use_count AS useCount FROM osh_course_tag t INNER JOIN osh_course_tag_rel r ON t.id = r.tag_id WHERE r.course_id = #{courseId} AND r.delete_flag = 0 AND t.delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_course_tag_rel (course_id, tag_id, create_time) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{tagId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_course_tag SET use_count = use_count + 1 WHERE id = #{tagId}
